review_title: HostGator Is Hands Down The Best
description: Phenomenal! Like I said, I have four websites now and all four are through HostGator.
author: Joe D.
pros: When I needed a professional looking website for my organization from a website builder that understood creating websites is not my strength, HostGator was perfect. Their 24/7 customer service is the best.
cons: I ended up getting four websites through them I was so pleased. At first understanding the difference between the two site building options was challenging, but with the assistance from customer service everything was great.

review_title: Hostgator is the best hosting service I use
description: Hostgator has always been my main hosting service, I tried the free hosting services and you can rarely reach the point of making a working website the way you want it. I like the many tools offered, Softaculous is probably the best in the CPanel as it allows you to properly install Wordpress in seconds without the hassle of uploading folders. I give it 4 out of 5 stars, I remove a star because I do not like their upselling tactics even if their customer support via live chat was always very helpful and solved issues within a few hours.
author: Tayeb A.
pros: - Affordable hosting - A wide variety of tools to host, buy a domain, edit php, install Wordpress and experts help. - Customer service experience was great as they offer live chat that can help solve issues whenever you need help.
cons: - By default, php limits are low which require you to increase them if you are using an imported theme. - They often try to sell you additional features and one should be careful at checkout as some additional options are checked by default and you need to uncheck them if you do not want them.

review_title: hostgator - not a good hosting provider
description: After 5 years of Hostgator, I have finally removed all of my sites and emails off their services. When I first started, they were reasonably priced, but they kept upping the monthly charges for shared hosting. At one point, I quit and started all over again to get a better rate after asking them to honor my old pricing. And again. Price creep. Their service levels have tanked. If I have an issue, then it's about an hour from my day with someone whose level of knowledge matches a boomer. IE none. Missing emails. Recently, emails sent from accounts disappear into the unkown. Emails being received are lost. Nothing in spam folders... Viruses. So all of a sudden after 5 years, I have 2000 pieces of malware on my WP sites. I update all the plug-ins etc., passwords are 'impossible' to break, and I don't use any dumb scripts. So all this malware has managed to breach hostgator's software, and they want me to use sitescan at $400? Right. Finally, without warning they suspended my ability to update anything without sitescan. If you are a newbie and have one site. Go for it. Otherwise, stay away.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: At first they were great. Cheap. Easy to use. Good customer service. But this all went downhill fast.
cons: Sudden large increases in renewal costs after the initial term, hidden charges for add-ons (like domain privacy or SiteLock), and difficulty getting refunds.

review_title: HostGator, a solution for bandwidth issues.
description: This is a good product if you’re looking for a well-performing web-hosting solution with good and reactive customer support. Whether you’re a small, mid, or big business, you can try it. Anyway, if you’re not satisfied, you can still get your money back in the next 45 days using the “refund if not satisfied” program.
author: Thierno Ousmane D.
pros: Hostgator is web-hosting software. The things that I like the most about this product: - The interface is actually navigation-friendly and intuitive, with the different sections and tabs clearly separated and well-disposed. There’s a cPanel that offers the same intuitiveness: We can type in a searching bar (located on the up-side of the screen) to find apps or any other function available, from the right-side of the cPanel there are pieces of information about the IP address for the server and some statistics such as the bandwidth capacity being used. It is a smooth ergonomy indeed; - Unlimited bandwidth for all three plans. This is a good thing because Hostgator is one of the few softwares in the market that offer unlimited traffic; - Regarding the SEO (Search Engine Optimization) topic, the loading speed is good: Hostgator loads at 2.7 seconds. It can be improved because the Google standard is 2.5 seconds. But, it is not a bad result at all! As soon as it is not below 3 seconds it is good. Many web-hosting opponents are behind in terms of loading speed.
cons: - Some security features like Sitelock (a security layer that protects us from hackers) need to be integrated into the basic plans without trying to sell them separately in other plans; - It would be better to decentralize the servers outside of the U.S to optimize the loading speed which will improve the SEO in the ranking competition.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Value for Small Business
description: Overall, my HostGator experience has been without issue. HG made it simple, and affordable, to obtain web hosting, build/design a website, and get my business online. I also like that I feel as though there are many additional features I have not been taking advantage of that are included with my hosting package (if I had more time).
author: Daniel N.
pros: My favorite thing about HostGator is the value! I use HostGator to host my website through a cheap shared hosting plan, and it was super simple to build my website and get it online using the tools that HostGator provided for a few bucks per month. I would certainly recommend HG to anyone starting a small business or needing a relatively simple way to give their business an online presence.
cons: The biggest difficult I have had so far with HostGator has been with correctly setting up DNS to properly direct a doman that I purchased from Google Domains to the HG servers while also allowing the Google Workspace email I purchased to function correctly. And this is something I really can't blame HG for. HG appears to allow integration with Gmail if you purchase your domain and hosting via HG and then add Gmail to handle your email. But, when you purchase your domain through Google and setup a Gmail account before purchasing hosting from HostGator, getting everything to work right did take a bit to figure out.

review_title: Fantastic web hosting company that is suitable for all kinds of websites
description: My overall experience is fantastic with Hostgator, this hosting company helped me to grow up my business and take it to the next level. Most of my clients like Hostgator web hosting even I also. In my web development carrier as a freelancer, I have used Hostgator so many times, can't explain how much helpful it was.
author: Torikul I.
pros: I'm a fan of their shared hosting especially because every time when I picked Hostgator shared hosting, it was much enough for me. Pricing is perfect, support is amazing, even the server performance is outstanding with almost 99.9% uptime. Hostgator provide WHM/cPanel that make the server configuration and management easier. However, they have multiple plans and packages build with a focus on users need. I tried all those packages and it was good enough for me from all sides.
cons: My experience with Hostgator is really good, I don't have any cons in my mind about this company. But there is one small thing I really hate about HostGator. I don't know it is maybe a bug related to the IP-Address of the users. When I try to do portal login to my Hostgator account, or one of my client's accounts, I can't do it simply. Page does not load properly, or sometimes shows an IP related problem from my country, this is really annoying.

review_title: Affordable Web Hosting Service for Small to medium sized businesses
description: Overall HostGator web hosting services provide efficient service and value for money. Customer service, especially the chat-based support is always my go-to.
author: Jithin A.
pros: HostGator interfaces are easy to use. Their Intro pricing is unbeatable and the support has always been great. Installing SSL certificates via Let's Encrypt is easy and automated.
cons: I would like to see more location-based server selection. For instance, I'm unable to choose a shared web hosting service that is physically located in Canada.

review_title: Worst experience!!! Never will recommend anyone
author: Arman D.
pros: There is no Pros what to mention here? They don't care about uptime, the only pros I will say that at least support is responsive to get in touch to RESOLVE the issue, but never share what was the case, never share if they plan any action to prevent such issues, and their answers are too robotic
cons: Shity hosting. They state uptime to be 99.9%, but it's not there. From my experience, for the last 365 days, the uptime was around 87%. We pay $300 for a dedicated server, and almost each month, the server is down for more then 1hr, with no explanation. They close the case stating that the server is now responsive and no issue can be found, with no lookback on why it happened, no explanation of the root cause. What they do is to reply, `I understand your concerns regarding the 99.9% uptime guarantee and the recent server unresponsiveness. I have thoroughly checked the server, and it is currently online and functioning properly with no issues detected.` In just the last 30 days, the server went down for already 4 times, one 30 min, one 1hr, another 20 min, and another 2 hrs with no explanation, nothing. And almost all of them happened during the peak business hours. Never will I recommend anyone who takes care of their own business website uptime!!!!

review_title: Hosting Worth the Money
description: We have been using HostGator for many years now, and it has been a great experience, the price, the support, and the features it provides. We use HostGator for our website and domain.
author: Marvin E.
pros: What I like most is the use of CPanel for the management of all features it comes with.
cons: Sometimes it takes a little while to get customer support.

review_title: Only real con was performance issues
author: Tenai S.
pros: It offers plenty of pros like a smooth cPanel, domain name, SSL certificate. It is fairly simple and adapted for creating first website or portfolio.
cons: My trial was quick because I did not see very convincing solutions that would make me switch to its offers. First, I had problems with performance and did not have support.

review_title: Plan Premium VPS Hostgator
description: Mi experiencia no ha sido satisfactoria y me encuentro un poco decepcionado con la calidad del servicio que repercute directamente en mi negocio hacia mis clientes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: La rápida habilitación del plan vps al momento de contratar y con los datos necesarios enviados por correo para comenzar su implementación.
cons: Al contratar el plan VPS Premium con las características que ofrecen, nos dimos cuenta que el servidor en cuestión no soporta 30 sitios basados en woocommerce sin que se ponga lento y genere errores. Los recursos son muy limitados. Además el precio es alto para lo que se ofrece. Por otra parte el soporte es muy deficiente ya que por chat nunca entregan una solución inmediata a un problema y por ticket pueden demorar hasta 4 días en responder.

review_title: Customer Service feels like scamming
author: ZhiMin H.
pros: Nothing is special with this company, just like any other. Only offering a good deal to new customer, charge them three times more after three years before the service end date without informing the customer. It's a trap and a hell. Asking refund it's impossible. So, if you use their service, make sure to turn off your automatic renew or put a credit card that's going to expire before the renew date. Or you will be screwed in a big way.
cons: By the end of three years of the baby plan, I was charged three times higher than the original payment without any notice. When I found out, I called the company immediately, the agent told me that she can't offer me the same deal as before. So I told her that I close my account, she agreed to fully refund me. However, 20 days later, I was not refunded, when I called back, they told me that they won't refund me and ask me to find a friend to take up the plan that I already paid. How is possible? A company can't keep up their words? knowing that I closed the account and not using their service and still not refunding me? I filled a dispute with my credit card company. I will never use Hostgator again!

review_title: Es un sitio para crear páginas web muy limitado
description: Para hacer una página muy sencilla es un producto adecuado, pero si es algo profesional y avanzado es nada recomendable, su mayor área de oportunidad está en el soporte.
author: Raul Alejandro B.
pros: Es muy intuitivo para crear páginas web incluso para los que no saben nada de programación y diseño web, se publica muy fácil y no tiene caídas el servicio.
cons: Sus plantillas son muy limitadas, le hace falta mas funciones de edición, es muy caro relación costo-beneficio y lo más importante que me hizo cambiarme de empresa, el soporte tarda mucho en responder, son muy groseros y no tienen la mínima intención de ayudar.

review_title: Hostgator is good if your website has low to medium traffic
description: I would say, Hostgator can be considered by small local businesses in case you are certain that the traffic will be limited. That way you will extract the best out of their services at a reasonable price. Once your traffic grows, consider moving out.
author: Alastair C.
pros: I've used Hostgator for over a decade and have seen all the ups and downs they have gone through over the years. The hosting service is good and inexpensive and serves you well if your website has low to medium traffic. However, the moment traffic increases, downtime may be seen and you may be asked to upgrade to another tier of hosting.
cons: Their customer service is shocking. A few years ago, Hostgator suffered a severe outage, and reaching their customer support was almost impossible. Live chat didn't work, phone calls were kept on hold for hours and email queries went unanswered. They have improved slightly but it is still well below par than it should be. Also, their customer retention team is quite rude and will hardly give you any discount for renewals on your hosting package. The main attraction to them is still their new users.

review_title: DON'T USE THEM
description: Really really really bad, see above. Don't use them
author: Elena B.
pros: Nothing. I need to meet 40 characters in this field
cons: I have hosting with hostgator.sg. They have closed down operation in Singapore however left website active. At the same time all support phone lines are down, support chat goes to 404 and sales chat connected to Hostgator India. It is pure scam to continue to sell hosting and domains, while no longer operating in the country.

review_title: Pésimo servicio, de todos los hosting que he contratado el peor
author: Francisco H.
pros: la plataforma del Cpanel es fácil de administrar y tienen un sistema de administración general de la cuenta que facilita algunos accesos, pagos entre otros.
cons: Muy mal servicio técnico, el servicio se cae y no hay respuesta, las solicitudes toman hasta 2 semanas en ser resueltas, llevamos 5 días sin servicios de webmail, para atender unas solicitud técnica tienes que esperar para ser atendido por medio de un chat que puede hacerte perder más de 1 y hasta 2 horas, realmente no vale la pena, tomamos este hosting por verse serio ser internacional y realmente sorprende la tranquilidad con la que prestan un mal servicio, por un precio que tampoco es tan bajo en relación a los competidores, en definitiva si estas en Chile te recomiendo 100% cualquier proveedor local del servicio.

review_title: Very flexible hosting and pricing options
description: Hostgator allowed me to skip the services of professional web developers in launching business websites for our clients. This not only allowed us to save considerable costs, but also saved time as well, as we could readily go back and edit published content whenever we needed, without having to rely on any technical third party to do it for us.
author: Isaac I.
pros: The Control panel feature is very well organized and offers very great functionality. It allows me to manage all the important elements of my account from one spot without needing to navigate back and forth between pages. The web builder tool is also quite intuitively designed for easy website designing and building.
cons: The customer service representatives, although readily accessible, were not very helpful in helping me resolve the issues I had with my published websites not appearing on search engines.

review_title: Easiest Website Builder I have ever used
description: HostGator allowed me to build a complete website for my company in the shortest amount of time imaginable. FROM SCRATCH. That was awesome for our timelines...since we had budget 3 weeks for it. The ease with which I did it made me extremely glad that I decided to DIY it.
author: Xorla X.
pros: The drag and drop feature for their inbuilt website builder tool is absolutely awesome. Setting up my first website was extremely easy, with a lot of useful tips and tools to guide you along on the use of the features and elements. I was able to complete my entire website in under 2 days from scratch.
cons: I signed up and paid for the Weebly feature, but it never fully loaded. Until I got fed up and used the free alternative my plan came with.

review_title: The Best Bluehost Alternative
author: Bilal K.
pros: Like Bluehost, It comes with all the essential set of features such as free 1-year domain registration, free SSL certificates, free email, and one-click WordPress install.
cons: Cloudflare CDN isn't included in Hatchling and Baby plans. It's only included in the Business plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Alternativa económica y sencilla para alojar proyectos web
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: El plan de precios es muy interesante y es relativamente simple de usar. Una muy buena opción para proyectos menores.
cons: Los tiempos de carga a veces son bastante lentos y a veces da algún problema configurando las DNS, pero al mismo tiempo sigue siendo una alternativa económica.

review_title: Better Than GoDaddy
description: My overall experience is great, it has been the perfect host for our website.
author: Regina S.
pros: What I liked most about this software is the email. No matter how many emails you need per domain, there is no extra charge; unlike GoDaddy.
cons: Editing our website can be a little confusing, but there is always someone who can help.

review_title: HostGator my expirience
author: Rui F.
pros: I liked the fact that HostGator was very user-friendly.
cons: There are a few things that I did not like about Hostgator.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: worst service of my life
author: Michel L.
pros: no tracking. Very slow to respond staff for a business like mine.
cons: no serious follow-up to my request after 6 days. I want my access. I have provided all my proof of identity and you tell me to do it as quickly as possible after 6 days? 6 days? Really? Your servers are located or in the world please.

review_title: HostGator experiencia
description: HostGator, pues... está bien, sin más. Lo elegí para mi blog porque lo conocía de antes y el precio estaba bien. En general, funciona, pero tampoco me ha vuelto loco. A veces va un poco lento y el soporte técnico no es la bomba.
author: Jan P.
pros: Lo bueno es que es fácil de usar, incluso para alguien que no tiene ni idea de hosting.
cons: Y otra cosa que no me gustó es que las opciones de seguridad y copias de seguridad son un poco flojas, sobre todo en los planes más baratos.

review_title: Bad Company
description: Worst company to take hosting dont care
author: faisal R.
pros: Website only remain up for few mins and goes down several times every hour
cons: Website only remain up for few mins and goes down several times every hour
